class.name: FestivalNPCProfile
class.brief_description: The full authoring schema for one islander.
class.description: NPCs are layered systems, not one-note quest dispensers. Each profile carries a schedule per phase, weather variants, four kinds of guarded knowledge, and a data-driven list of conditional [member interactions] evaluated by [FestivalDirector]. Each schedule and variant is a [Dictionary] of free-form keys (typically [code]location[/code] and [code]activity[/code]). Each entry of [member interactions] is a [Dictionary] understood by the director, with optional keys such as [code]requires_outfit[/code], [code]requires_role[/code], [code]requires_items[/code], [code]requires_presented[/code], [code]requires_knowledge[/code], [code]requires_flags[/code], [code]requires_phase[/code], [code]requires_weather[/code], and outcome keys [code]grants_knowledge[/code], [code]sets_flags[/code], [code]gives_items[/code], [code]takes_items[/code], [code]advance_phase[/code] and [code]trigger_milestone[/code].

members.member: The NPC's hidden history beneath the charming surface.
The raw Secret Census source record this profile was imported from, kept so no exported detail is lost.
The outfit id this NPC themselves wears.
Arbitrary authored fields, each a [Dictionary] with keys [code]id[/code], [code]label[/code] and [code]value[/code].
Knowledge id of the NPC's dark secret.
The NPC's name.
Knowledge id of an untrue belief about the NPC.
Password phrases this NPC can reveal; each maps to a [FestivalKnowledge] entry (see [method FestivalCensusImporter.password_knowledge_id]).
Unique identifier used by the registry.
Array of interaction [Dictionary] definitions evaluated by [FestivalDirector].
Ids of [FestivalPlotHook] storylines this NPC takes part in.
Free-form authoring notes.
What the NPC does for a living.
Directed NPC-to-NPC edges, each a [Dictionary] with camelCase keys [code]targetNpcId[/code], [code]type[/code] and [code]reciprocalType[/code] (part of the Secret Census import contract).
Where the NPC lives.
Knowledge id of a true rumor about the NPC.
State during the Afternoon phase.
State during the Morning phase.
State during the Night phase.
Knowledge id of the NPC's guarded secret.
The NPC's animal species.
Charming-at-first-glance surface description.

Keys merged over the phase schedule when it is raining. Keys [code]morning[/code], [code]afternoon[/code] and [code]night[/code] holding a [Dictionary] are phase-scoped: they are merged only while that phase is active.

Keys merged over the phase schedule when it is sunny. Keys [code]morning[/code], [code]afternoon[/code] and [code]night[/code] holding a [Dictionary] are phase-scoped: they are merged only while that phase is active.
Where the NPC works.
